tasks.description: Add spec validation gate to orchestrator
tasks.context: Modify backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to validate task specs before MiniMax execution. Check: valid file paths against file tree, single-file constraint, context <600 chars, required fields present. Reject invalid tasks immediately with detailed error. Prevents cascade failures from malformed specs.

Modify backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to add isolation mode config. When enabled, each task executes independently — failures do not cascade to subsequent tasks. Track failure count per sprint. Store isolation mode state in orchestrator config. Defaults to enabled.

tasks.description: Create circuit breaker for >50% failure rate
tasks.context: Modify backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to add circuit breaker. Track sprint task success/failure ratio. If failures exceed 50%, halt sprint execution immediately. Set status flag and prepare alert payload with sprint ID, failure count, failed task IDs.

tasks.description: Add CEO Telegram alert for circuit breaker
tasks.context: Modify backend/src/telegram/ceoBot.ts to add handler for orchestrator circuit breaker events. Send immediate alert when >50% failure threshold triggered. Include: sprint goal, failure count, task IDs, timestamp. Format for actionable CEO response.

tasks.description: Add file path validator against real tree
tasks.context: Create backend/src/services/task-file-validator.ts. Export function that accepts file path and validates against known file tree (embed or load from config). Returns boolean + error detail. Used by ORCH-001 spec validation gate. Prevents non-existent file references.

tasks.description: Update orchestrator config with fault tolerance flags
tasks.context: Modify backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts to add: specValidationEnabled (default true), taskIsolationEnabled (default true), circuitBreakerThreshold (default 0.5), ceoAlertEnabled (default true). Expose via config interface for runtime control.
